name: Evergreen Hills Golf Club & Resort
notes: Address: 152 Moo 5, Tambon Rang Sale (Rangsali), Tha Muang District, Kanchanaburi 71110. Designer At-anan Yomchinda (also spelled At-anan Yochinda). Year opened given as 1992 by 1golf.eu/Golfasian; 1994 by some other sources — 1992 used as primary. Course length 6,879 yards. Green fees: weekday THB 800, weekend THB 1,200 per official website and 1golf.eu. Caddie fee THB 300 (official site). Cart fee THB 700 (official site); weekend/holiday cart 500 THB single or 700 THB for 2 persons per cart. Golf set rental THB 900; shoes THB 200; umbrella THB 100. Resort has 77 rooms; popular with Korean golfers. Located between Kanchanaburi and Hua Hin, ~50 minutes from Kanchanaburi town, ~2 hours from Bangkok. Alternative phone from Golfsavers: +66 62 971 5436. Secondary phone: +66 294128015 (1golf.eu — may be formatted incorrectly). Signature hole: island greens on holes 16 and 17. Night golf available. Sources: evergreenhillsgolfclub.com, golfasian.com, golfsavers.com, 1golf.eu, thailandgolfers.com
